description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and on pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to build multiple packages (managarm-kernel, managarm-system, managarm-kernel-uefi) on multiple architectures (x86_64, aarch64, riscv64) with specific exclusions. For each job, run on an ubuntu-24.04 environment, permit unprivileged user namespaces, install prerequisites, checkout bootstrap-managarm and Managarm repositories, download a rootfs, prepare the build environment, build the package, generate an image, test the package, and run clang-tidy.
